Importantly, Swish-Strip does not contain ammonia, which is harmful to health and the environment. The surfactants used comply with European criteria for biodegradability. Full disinfecting spectrum at a dilution of 1:62 (160 ml of product per 10 litres of water). Apply the solution to the surface to be cleaned and leave for up to 10 minutes. Quato 44 is highly effective against bacteria, viruses and fungi even when diluted with hard water (250 ppm).

If you have any questions, please contact our team.
